programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: It's the end of term and Will has been voted the chairman of the Christmas prom committee. Okay, he was the only person who wanted the job, but he's still taking it seriously.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: A parody of war includes the invasion of Norway by tutu-clad commandos and a plea to the public to treat the war seriously.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: Hamlet undergoes psychoanalysis; eight Queen Victorias compete in the Queen Victoria handicap race; a boxing contender gets his head knocked off.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: The search for Mr. Neutron, who plans to dominate the world, stretches from a London suburb to the Yukon, and results in the destruction of earthly civilization.

programme.title: Monty Python's Flying Circus
programme.desc: A spoof of British political-party broadcasts includes the finals of "the worst family in Britain" contest, a violent cricket match and a housewife who revolutionized beekeeping.

programme.title: Drop The Dead Donkey: Damien Down and Out
programme.desc: Damien lives as a have-not to report how it is; George's marriage falls apart.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham struggles to deal with Louisa's news, but Louisa is adamant she does not want Martin involved.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham is shocked to find Louisa and Aunt Joan knocking at his door before the Surgery has opened. Louisa has had a medical scare and wants Martin's reassurance that everything is fine.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham is called to Louisa's new home after she has a dizzy spell while shifting furniture, so Martin urges her to slow down.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: A family sues Joan after she traps their highly troublesome child in her chicken coop, after which he develops a mysterious malaise.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham meets Portwenn's new midwife, Molly, who will be looking after Louisa. Martin is dismissive of her profession and the two of them do not hit it off.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham seeks out Louisa to talk about his new job in London, but they are interrupted by Bert, who wants to plan a baby shower for Louisa.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham and Pauline are surprised by the number of patients coming to see him on the last day before his surgery closes and he moves to London.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Curmudgeonly Martin Ellingham's plans to resume his career as a consultant in London are put on hold with the birth of the son he fathered with his now estranged partner, Louisa Glasson.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: The GP returns to his former post at the surgery after the departure of Dr. Dibbs, agreeing to stay until a replacement is found.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: New receptionist Morwenna Newcross gets off to a bad start after arriving late on her first day, and her hyperactive behavior leads Martin to believe she is high on drugs.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Louisa's hippie mother Eleanor arrives in the village, immediately taking over Martin's kitchen to prepare a herbal tonic, which she later gives to the baby to stop his crying.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: PC Penhale is shocked by the unexpected arrival of his ex-wife Maggie, who appears to have forgotten that they separated years ago and wants to know why he left her.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Maggie gets the all-clear from the doctor and decides she will return to Bude, forcing PC Penhale to take desperate measures to persuade her to stay in Portwenn.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Bert Large's restaurant business is in financial trouble: he can't even afford the food and drink for a charity event to raise money for Florence Dingle's cat sanctuary.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la desaparición de un contramaestre de la Marina que es el único testigo en un juicio por asesinato que se avecina.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y el equipo del NCIS se asocian con un agente del Servicio de Investigación de la Guardia Costera (CGIS) para resolver el asesinato de un marine tiroteado en un barco restaurante.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La sesión de reclutamiento de un suboficial en una feria universitaria tiene un final fatal, lo que lleva al equipo del NCIS, acompañado por el predecesor del Dr. Mallard, a resolver su asesinato.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Héroes olvidados
programme.desc: Cuando Danny y su familia son amenazados por Thomas Wilder (Louis Cancelmi), un asesino en serie que Danny no ha podido detener, la preocupación de Linda se intensifica por el trabajo de su marido y por el estado de su matrimonio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Resistencia
programme.desc: Erin retoma un caso de homicidio estancado y, con la ayuda de Anthony Abetemarco, busca un testigo clave que había desaparecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las banderas de nuestros padres
programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un joven desaparece de su casa en St. Louis, la UAC vuelve a investigar un caso similar sin resolver en busca del sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamado a Kansas para investigar una serie de asesinatos, una reunión tensa comienza entre Blake y su padre, un capitán de policía retirado, y su hermano, un detective, y deben trabajar juntos para ayudar a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC va a San José para investigar una serie de asesinatos, García profundiza en su pasado hacker y se reencuentra con su antiguo amor para ayudar al equipo con el caso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Mientras que el UAC busca un asesino múltiple suelto en Cleveland, Rossi se preocupa cuando un antiguo sargento de la Marina se pierde y se dirige a Los Ángeles para encontrarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With one week until the start of the season, Kelli and Judy make a tough cut, the show group performs for the first time, and Charlotte Jones Anderson judges rehearsal.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To make their final cut, Kelli and her team try to find one hopeful of the remaining 37 who isn't ready to perform at the Cowboys' home opener.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Rachyl puts her dreams of becoming a lawyer on hold to support her husband, Kerry, in chasing after his goal of being a country musician in Nashville.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: When Kerry becomes unresponsive during his tour, the reality of his absence makes Rachyl question their future. Meanwhile, Jackson is ready to get closer to Jessica, but a surprise revelation may stand in the way of them getting more serious.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: The road calls and Kerry considers taking a gig on a tour that conflicts with his wedding anniversary. When Rachyl informs Kerry that she is seriously considering law schools in other states, Kerry puts his foot down.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Jackson tries to take things slow with Jessica until unexpected temptations drive him back to his old ways. When Rachyl receives a text from an ex, her past threatens to derail her present. Alexandra competes in the Miss Tennessee USA Pageant.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Jackson has to decide if he's ready for a serious relationship with Jessica, or if pageant girl Savana is more his speed. Rachyl struggles to tell Kerry about a recent text exchange with an Ex who just moved back to Nashville.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Jackson might be biting off more than he can chew when he decides to perform live, and Kerry progresses his music career when he connects with another singer.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: After Kerry comes home late after a night out with Brooke, Rachyl grapples with the state of their relationship. Jackson practices with Jessica for his upcoming birthday performance, but Savana becomes suspicious of how much time they spend together.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: On the season finale, Rachyl and Kerry make a big decision about their future, and Jackson comes to a realization about Jessica (and his music) after Savana's ultimatum.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Kerry wants to hire a publicist, Alexandra prepares for the Miss USA pageant, Jessica looks forward to her wedding, and Rachyl reconnects with an old friend.

programme.title: Music City
programme.desc: Alexandra forces Jackson to make a big decision, Alisa believes Bryant has a secret, and Rachyl gets closer to Jeremiah, which causes tension between her and Jessica.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/5/2019. While in and around Seattle, Kamau takes a look at different forms of activism that white people are using to combat America’s history of white supremacy and the rise of extreme right wing groups across the country.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 5/12/2019. Kamau meets members of the Hmong community brought here after the Secret War forced their expulsion from Laos and learns the multi generational stories of loss, perseverance and hope that make up their American journey.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 04/20/2017. Exploring the music that kept the spirit of the civil rights movement alive following Martin Luther King Jr.’s death.

programme.title: Soundtracks
programme.desc: Aired 04/27/2017. In the wake of the 9/11 attacks, songs about New York have heightened meaning, while politically-charged country music takes center stage.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown

programme.title: The Wonder List

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/08/2015. The world’s leading naturalists fight to keep this precious natural habitat in balance and save critically-endangered species from extinction.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/15/2015. The inhabitants of this remote Greek island live far longer than most Americans, but can they maintain their centuries-old way of life in the modern world?

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand
programme.desc: Aired 02/14/2021. Abraham Lincoln's life before political stardom, from his frontier roots to his courtship of Mary Todd Lincoln, who pushed him to great political heights.

programme.title: Lincoln: Divided We Stand
programme.desc: Aired 02/21/2021. Lincoln showed how poignant oration, political savvy and moral conviction could help a lawyer from Illinois ascend from obscurity to the White House.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects wreck their vehicle while attempting to evade police in a hot pursuit. Officers respond to a domestic dispute involving neighbors. A suspect abandons his truck and shoes while running from Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught with a stolen moped attempts to run while handcuffed. Police find a man with his pants down behind a business. A suspect found asleep in his poorly parked car complains of sciatic pain.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers search for suspects stealing rims at a car dealership. A married couple claim drugs found in their car were from a nearby ditch. Officers detain an inebriated man arguing with a store clerk.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A skittish driver’s decision results in a trip to the hospital. A car full of young men swear they were trying to escape an imminent threat. An innocent woman struggles with the decision to press charges on her friend.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies assist an injured woman who vows revenge on her male attackers. A woman tells deputies her husband beat her in front of their children. Officers protect an elderly woman from an abusive child.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate trespasser attempts to give the cops the slip, and a frightened man tries to get the attention of deputies but takes the wrong approach.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man can’t handle that his van is getting repossessed. An Uncle finds his nephew has been hiding all kinds of secrets. Past lovers find their old wounds have yet to heal.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman tells officers she’s a vampire. Officers question a colorful man dressed as a woman. A violent woman screams obscenities at officers and needs to be restrained.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted felon attempts to outrun the deputies, undercover officers conduct a sting in an area known for prostitution, and a domestic dispute between cousins goes too far.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect sends police on a high-speed chase, a wanted man attempts to flee from officers on a bicycle, and security cameras catch a man trying to conceal items in his pants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car. Unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest. A man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police chase a man running away from his car and a warrant, a driver is just as unlicensed as his vehicle, and a domestic violence call involves two lovers and a hammer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Security guards face wild threats from a suspect who states he has a 'burner' gun. A man is bit on the head and nearly faints. A passenger throws out a suspicious bag during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a highspeed pursuit of a stolen vehicle. Police contact the Fire Department and alert the guests when they spot a motel fire. Officers pursue a suspect on a stolen motorcycle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A couple assaults a tow lot employee who won't release their car, a suspicious man catches a patrol's attention, and police detain a carload of suspected shoplifters.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man leads officers on a frantic foot-chase, deputies assist two teens in tracking down a man who stole their bike, and a dispute between roommates takes a dark turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist allegedly mistakes a deputy for a thief and tries to escape into the bushes. Police cut a dad some slack by not towing the family car. Two sisters catch the police’s attention when they take their spat to the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers split up to interrogate two men suspected of stealing a pick-up truck, a motorist tries to ditch a bag of meth, and police discover a bunch of syringes in a vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Spike strips are used to end a pursuit, but not before a woman falls out. A passenger flees from a stop and changes clothes. A woman from Oklahoma driving a windowless car admits to using meth.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, for his final proficiency, has to determine how the Sherlock Holmes of a Sherlock Holmes club was killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick looks into the murder of a man by someone who apparently needs a wheelchair. Nick looks into the murder of a woman in the subculture of the narcocorrido, songs about drug murders.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick, and Nick find the body of two women at a construction site buried under tar. The swing shift is brought into the world of foreign mail-order brides.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofia, Sara, and Greg investigate the disappearance of a woman coming home from a night out with a friend after her abandoned car is found on the edge of a highway.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a major Las Vegas player is found dead, Ecklie orders both teams to investigate the case. The man who had secrets on everyone in Vegas had a very big one of his own.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Warrick investigate a badly mutilated body in the woods. Grissom, Sarah, and Greg try to determine how a man was killed in a hotel room. It leads them to a convention of big women.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A serial killer strikes again, and the CSI team tries new technology using evidence from a prior killing.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Greg investigate a wildfire that killed one man and badly burned a woman. Catherine, Nick, and Warrick get the case of a family of three murdered in their home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: One night, four cases. Grissom and Brass get a stolen hummer and a taco stand. Warrick gets a dead car showgirl. Sara and Greg get a dead bodybuilder. Nick gets a dead boy found on a bench.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass travels to Hollywood, California to try to track down his estranged daughter's friend, meanwhile trying to rekindle some kind of relationship with her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the murder of a mental-hospital patient and quickly narrow down the suspects to a handful of other patients and staff members.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man (Alan Rosenberg) whom Catherine flirted with at a bar reappears in her life as a suspect in a murder investigation of a woman who was shot and killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two amorous freshmen are found dead in a sleeping bag in a dorm room, and Sara and Greg run into one dead end after another as they try to determine why the students were killed.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI teams come together to save one of their own when they learn one team member has been kidnapped and buried alive, and now they must find him before he suffocates under 5 feet of dirt.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un importante jugador de Las Vegas aparece muerto, Ecklie ordena a ambos equipos que investiguen el caso. El hombre que tenía secretos sobre todos en Las Vegas tenía uno muy grande propio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick y Warrick investigan un cadáver gravemente mutilado en el bosque. Grissom, Sarah y Greg intentan determinar cómo fue asesinado un hombre en una habitación de hotel. Esto les lleva a una convención de mujeres grandes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie ataca de nuevo, y el equipo de CSI prueba una nueva tecnología utilizando pruebas de un asesinato anterior.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Greg investigan un incendio forestal que mató a un hombre y quemó gravemente a una mujer. Catherine, Nick y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una familia de tres miembros asesinada en su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una noche, cuatro casos. Grissom y Brass consiguen un Hummer robado y un puesto de tacos. Warrick atrapa a una chica muerta. Sara y Greg consiguen un culturista muerto. Nick consigue un chico muerto encontrado en un banco.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Brass viaja a Hollywood, California, para intentar localizar a la amiga de su hija distanciada, mientras intenta reavivar algún tipo de relación con ella.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y Sara investigan el asesinato de un paciente de un hospital psiquiátrico y rápidamente reducen los sospechosos a un puñado de otros pacientes y miembros del personal.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un hombre (Alan Rosenberg) con el que Catherine flirteó en un bar reaparece en su vida como sospechoso en la investigación del asesinato de una mujer a la que dispararon y mataron.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos amorosos estudiantes de primer año son encontrados muertos en un saco de dormir en un dormitorio, y Sara y Greg se topan con un callejón sin salida tras otro mientras intentan determinar por qué fueron asesinados los estudiantes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los equipos de CSI se unen para salvar a uno de los suyos cuando se enteran de que un miembro del equipo ha sido secuestrado y enterrado vivo, y ahora deben encontrarlo antes de que se asfixie bajo metro y medio de tierra.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los equipos de CSI se unen para salvar a uno de los suyos cuando se enteran de que un miembro del equipo ha sido secuestrado y enterrado vivo, y ahora deben encontrarlo antes de que se asfixie bajo metro y medio de tierra.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro equipo forense vuelve a estar unido, con Grissom y Catherine liderando tres fantásticos misterios forenses.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una estrella de cine es encontrada muerta en su habitación de hotel después de una fiesta, mientras que un taxista muerto lleva al equipo a una serie de muertes que involucran a trabajadores inmigrantes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Nuestro grupo de investigación de crímenes intenta determinar si hubo juego sucio en la caída de un ama de casa por las escaleras.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio deals with ghosts from his past, the team races against time to save Calleigh from a group of dangerous kidnappers.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team must act quickly to stop a vigilante who has been on a killing spree, targeting Internet predators.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A body in a sinkhole leads Horatio and the CSI team to a robbery, while investigating they discover the target holds a shocking secret.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When Alexx's son becomes a suspect in a murder, saving him has dire consequences. Horatio and the CSI team must act to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When someone is determined to take down Horatio and the CSI team, Horatio puts his life on the line in order to save his team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team will stop at nothing to find who shot Horatio, the evidence leads them to some of the most dangerous people in Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When gasoline gets so expensive that Miami’s residents kill for it, the CSIs come face to face with one of the city’s most sadistic crime rings.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the daughter of Delko's therapist is murdered, Horatio and the CSI team must find the killer before Delko's darkest secrets are exposed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A savage double murder in the Everglades pits Horatio and the CSI team against the brute force of Miami's own Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder in Miami's hippest fashion boutique, Horatio discovers that Julia's instability has turned her into a ticking bomb.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A 200-foot crane crashes into a Miami high rise, putting Calleigh and Delko in jeopardy and killing Horatio’s hope of catching a renowned crime boss.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man is found handcuffed and stabbed in his hotel room, while a prank at the lab causes a rift in the CSI team and threatens their investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a murderer kidnaps an innocent baby, Horatio and the CSI team must find him before the child becomes his next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio llega rápidamente al lugar cuando asaltan a un camión blindado que transporta 3.2 millones de dólares en un atrevido atraco en el centro de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin se convierte literalmente en parte de la escena de un crimen después de robar un guante de látex para agregarlo a su colección forense personal.

programme.desc: Amanda, una terapeuta especializada en ayudar a las mujeres a terminar las relaciones destructivas, vive lejos de los hombres y del compromiso. Dedicada al trabajo y la protección de su hermana Natalia.

programme.title: Revancha
programme.desc: Tras un exitoso atraco, Porter es dado por muerto. Una vez recuperado, busca venganza y quiere su parte del dinero.

programme.title: Un crimen inesperado
programme.desc: El hijo de un oficial de la policía de Nueva York asesinado se une a la fuerza y cae en línea con el ex compañero de su padre, y un equipo de policías deshonestos.

programme.title: Sobredosis
programme.desc: Dos policías con puntos de vista y métodos opuestos se ven obligados a trabajar juntos para resolver un sangriento atropello que puede estar relacionado con el asesinato de dos adolescentes.

programme.title: Yo soy la venganza
programme.desc: Un hombre inicia un camino de venganza contra varios oficiales de policía corruptos, al ser incapaz de descubrir al asesino de su mujer.

programme.title: Avengement (LAS)
programme.desc: Fixed localization: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra esacapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sanfre fría.

programme.title: Invasión USA
programme.desc: Un ejército terrorista encabezado por el agente soviético Rostov (Richard Lynch) sorprende en EE. UU. y lo sumerge en una guerra. Solo un hombre puede poner fin a la violencia: el agente retirado de las artes marciales Matt Hunter (Chuck Norris).

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Un policía fuerte (Jason Statham, "Fast & Furious 7") es designado para atrapar a un asesino en serie que ataca a oficiales de policía. Con Paddy Considine, Aiden Gillen, Mark Rylance y Luke Evans.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda
programme.desc: Una comedia romántica sobre cómo la boda del siglo salió mal en todas las formas posibles.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre
programme.desc: La nueva era choca con la vieja en esta hilarante y cálida comedia familiar sobre un anciano gruñón de 85 años que se muda con su hijo y sus excéntricos compañeros de casa.

programme.title: La luz incidente
programme.desc: Una mujer joven que tiene problemas al criar a sus hijas gemelas después de que su marido y su hermano mueren, acepta el cortejo de un pretendiente encantador pero misterioso, mayor que ella.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Neruda
programme.desc: At the start of the Cold War, subversive Chilean senator and poet Pablo Neruda is pursued by police prefect Oscar Peluchonneau. Unable to flee the country, Neruda goes into hiding and becomes a symbol of liberty at home and in Europe.

programme.title: La hija de la luz
programme.desc: Con rasgos que rememoran al sexto sentido y la profecía llega este fascinante thriller sobrenatural lleno de escalofríos y un gran suspenso.

programme.title: El último exorcismo: Parte II
programme.desc: Nell está de nuevo en la seguridad de la civilización y es enviada a vivir en una casa de acogida, donde se la anima a dejar atrás su pasado e iniciar una nueva vida.

programme.title: Encubrimiento
programme.desc: Una policía investiga el asesinato de un compañero y se enfrenta a un espíritu maligno que acosas a los policías de su unidad. Pronto descubre el siniestro secreto sobre el encubrimiento de un tiroteo en contra de un joven desarmado.

programme.title: Sospechoso cero
programme.desc: Un agente del FBI que investiga la muerte de un asesino serial sigue la pista de un justiciero que dedica su vida a perseguir asesinos seriales.

programme.title: Event Horizon: La nave de la muerte
programme.desc: En 2047, un equipo de astronautas se embarca en una misión para recuperar una nave espacial. Sin embargo, esta simple tarea los conducirá a algo mucho más aterrador de lo que imaginaban.

programme.title: Leviatán: terror en las profundidades
programme.desc: En esta película de ciencia ficción, un equipo de exploración de aguas profundas descubre un barco de carga con un secreto mortal.

programme.title: P2

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Gambit
programme.desc: Un curador de arte decide vengarse de su abusivo jefe engañándolo para que compre un Monet falso, pero su plan requiere la ayuda de una excéntrica e impredecible reina del rodeo de Texas.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: El gurú del amor
programme.desc: Una hilarante comedia sobre un estadounidense criado en India por gurús que luego vuelve a los Estados Unidos más grande para iniciarse en el negocio de la autoayuda.

programme.title: Los Coneheads
programme.desc: Con una mirada sabrás que son de un lugar muy extraño. Son Coneheads.

programme.title: Los tres amigos
programme.desc: Las locuras de tres actores hollywoodenses (Steve Martin, Chevy Chase y Martin Short) que enfrentan a un grupo de bandidos mexicanos. ¿Qué podría salir mal?

programme.title: Envidia
programme.desc: Un hombre empieza a sentir cada vez más celos del nuevo éxito de su amigo.

programme.title: Vera Cruz

programme.title: One Eyed Jacks
programme.desc: Marlon Brando’s only time as a Directo, Rio (Marlon Brando) also called "The Kid", his mentor Dad Longworth (Karl Malden), & a third man called Doc, rob a bank of two saddlebags of gold in Sonora, Mexico.

programme.title: The Legend Of the Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The sole surviving Texas Ranger of an ambush arranged by the outlaw leader Butch Cavandish returns to fight back as a great masked western hero - The Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In order to steal enough explosives to blow up a difficult bridge, Hogan's men paint anti-Nazi graffiti on the camp's ammo building.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Corporal LeBeau pretends to be a visiting French scientist while Hogan smuggles out the real one.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph (Mary Grace Canfield) is distraught when her beloved Mr. Kimball, is fired as the county agricultural agent. Out of a job, Kimball (Alvy Moore) no longer has money enough to marry the lady-carpenter-in-waiting! But wait…did he even want to?

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa weaves the tale of her great, great grandmother, the Queen of the Gypsies, to explain a bizarre family tradition: a woman in her family must marry an American -- but only every fourth generation -- in order to gain a special inheritance.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After Oliver (Eddie Albert) accidentally drops a hammer on her head, Lisa (Eva Gabor) develops a case of amnesia, with no idea who she is or why she is on a farm in Hooterville…and she adamantly refuses to believe that Oliver is her husband!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Nothing gets done on the Douglas farm when Oliver (Eddie Albert) gifts Eb (Tom Lester) a top-of-the-line radio for his birthday. Letting nothing stop him, Eb (Tom Lester) enters a radio contest...even when Eleanor the cow swallows the radio whole.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa (Eva Gabor) is delighted to learn that her Hungarian mother is planning a visit to their little farm. Much to Oliver's (Eddie Albert) disbelief and dismay, a rumor spreads all around Hooterville that Lisa's mother is a European countess.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Edith becomes friends with Nick Howard, the plumber's assistant who happens to be a convict on a work-release program from Sing Sing. When Archie discovers this, he becomes paranoid and begins to feel unsafe in his home.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike and Gloria have been practicing something call 'Fair Fighting' in which they set aside time to vent their frustrations. After seeing Archie yet again push Edith around, Mike and Gloria encourage her to try out a little 'Fair Fighting.'

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is hoping to have a relaxing Sunday, but his hopes are dashed when Edith announces that her cousin Amelia and her husband Russell are coming over for a visit, who may be on the brink of a divorce.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude is shocked and outraged when she receives a series of obscene phone calls, but her biggest shock is yet to come when she discovers who's on the other end.

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude and Vivian go back to college for their thirty-year reunion, Vivian wants to go back in time and do it all over again -- this time without her husband Arthur.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Carol's beguiling ex-husband suddenly turns on the charm and captivates the Findlay household, Maude and Carol are astounded to discover his motives.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur is determined to teach his visiting grandson the important things in life, but it's the guilty grandpa who learns the most valuable lesson of all.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: After an operation, Louie, the sharp-tongued dispatcher, panics when he has to keep a promise that he made to God during surgery to turn over a new leaf.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: When Alex’s ear is nearly shot off in a holdup attempt in his cab, he stuns his fellow cabbies by quitting and exchanging his driving clothes for a waiter’s tuxedo at a snobbish French restaurant.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: The cabbies fall victim to a Hollywood-style roller coaster ride when a production company visits to do a film on taxi drivers. Life at the Sunshine Cab Company turns into a continual champagne and buffet festivity.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Officer Bubba Skinner is seduced by a beautiful lady who has taken residence in Sparta in order to write a novel. But when her estranged ex-husband shows up, things become much more complicated, and Bubba is faced with a life-changing decision.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Virgil believes he acted in self-defense when he shoots a robbery suspect. But when the teenage girl's gun cannot be found, suspicions arise, even he begins to doubt his own actions. Chief Bill Gillespie does all he can to clear his detective.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Virgil Tibbs’s niece and Bubba Skinner's nephew, teenagers from different worlds, find common ground -- and trouble -- in Sparta. Soon the two are swept up with an ex-con recently paroled from prison, and Gillespie is none too happy about it.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.desc: When Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) is informed that a death row prisoner wants him present at his execution, the chief struggles over whether capital punishment is cruel and unusual punishment or an appropriate sentence for the crime he committed.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Detective Virgil Tibbs investigates a series of elderly citizens that are being beaten and robbed. Things become more complicated as Detective Tibbs in-laws are visiting from Philadelphia trying to get him and his wife to move back home.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Tibbs and Sweet investigate a woman who has been beaten and left for dead on the banks of a local creek. Tibbs, in particular, takes an interest in this possible wife-beating case and, in the process, unlocks part of his difficult and painful past.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Detective Virgil Tibbs and Chief Bill Gillespie investigate a murder of a father of two very different daughters who are caught up in a case of intense sibling rivalry...one that may have led one or both of them to murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.desc: Kwai Chang Caine (David Carradine), a half-American Buddhist monk from China, restores the eyes and faith of a phony preacher (John Carradine), blinded by Indians, and finds his own roots in America.

programme.desc: This classic episode finds a robot on trial for the murder of the scientist who created him. Leonard Nimoy stars as the cock-sure reporter who coaxes a crusty lawyer (Howard Da Silva) out of retirement to defend the accused. Ford Rainey co-stars.

programme.desc: Robert Duvall and Ivan Dixon lead an impressive cast in this haunting episode in which four wounded American soldiers find themselves endowed with amazing mental powers and compelled to complete a secret project they do not understand. Part 1 of 2.

programme.desc: The new attending physician, Kate Delibe, is causing a stir at Community General with her unorthodox methods of care. Delibe assists terminally ill patient George Dugan's suicide against Dr. Sloan's wishes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Suela reveladora

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When a group of parents try to stop the play, Eli takes action. As opening night approaches, Tristan realizes that if he doesn't find a boyfriend fast, his first kiss will be onstage -- with Dave. Meanwhile, Becky wants to "save" Adam.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On opening night for Romeo and Jules, Tristan is nowhere to be found. Is it stage fright -- or something worse? While Eli is busy with the play, Clare decides to get even with Asher.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As Becky begins to fall for Adam, she worries how her conservative parents will react.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frustrated with her heavy workload, Alli decides to have a little fun -- with or without Dave.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: As WhisperHug prepares for the band competition, things get messy between Adam and Missy.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: During Spirit Week at Degrassi, everyone has something to prove. Cam feels threatened by Zig, Dallas makes a flirty bet with Alli, and Eli's relationship with Clare is tested.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Worried about Eli's mental state, Clare becomes overprotective. Katie wants Jake back, but is it too late? Jenna must choose between two guys.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Drew moves out, there's a break-in at the loft, and Fiona fears for her safety. Someone from Dallas' past pays him a surprise visit. A tough assignment forces Zig to think about the mistakes he's made.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Fiona takes drastic measures to feel safer at home, and puts herself in danger. Dallas avoids telling Alli the truth about his past. After blowing off a French assignment, Zig tries to impress the teacher,

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya lets loose at a party and posts a video online, hoping it'll change her image. The battle for the student council presidency heats up when Drew enters the race. Connor tries to play matchmaker for his friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a stressful audition, Maya tosses her cello in the trash, and decides to have more fun. The competition between Drew and Clare intensifies. Connor offers Eli some advice about love.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: School's out and summer's in! A few lucky Degrassi students are bound for a once-in-a-lifetime trip to Paris, accompanied by some fresh new faces. And then there are others playing counselor at Degrassi Day Camp.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Why is Becky blowing Adam off to spend time with Todd? Who's Todd? Adam is not liking this long-distance relationship thing. Alli is falling hard for her Parisian waiter and worries maybe too hard too fast?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Adam takes Dallas' advice and tries juggling two girls at once. But he's not that kind of guy. When upset Tristan goes AWOL in Paris, Maya enlists her sworn enemy for help find him and Alli continues to try and find balance in her relationships.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Here, Bill Oddie asks whether the Velociraptor was really the monstrous predator of popular legend.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: America was once home to such fierce predators as the giant short-faced bear and the saber-toothed tiger.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: In Australia 65,000 years ago, the first human explorers face a land populated with giant lizards, killer rhino-like creatures and deadly birds.

programme.title: Monsters We Met
programme.desc: The Maori struggled for survival 1,000 years ago in a New Zealand populated by giant birds.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Natural World
programme.desc: For thousands of years, downtown LA hid an indiscriminate killer. In one of the most surprising wildlife crime stories in the world, `Natural World' turns forensic detective to solve the mystery and unmask victims and killers.

programme.title: Land of Giants: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Witness the spectacle of the fearsome predator Giganotosaurus.

programme.title: The Giant Claw: A Walking With Dinosaurs Special
programme.desc: Zoologist Nigel Marvin travels back in time on a prehistoric safari.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: The lives of cavemen were nasty, brutish and short, but somehow they evolved over 3.5 million years into homo sapiens.

programme.title: Walking With Cavemen
programme.desc: Two very different species compete for survival in Africa 2,000,000 years ago.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Attack of the Cybermen
programme.desc: The Cybermen are hiding in the London sewers and turning humans into semi-cybernetic slaves. On Telos, two slaves make a bid for freedom and find a way to escape the planet for good.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Attack of the Cybermen
programme.desc: On Telos, the Doctor is reintroduced to the Cyber Leader and meets the Cryons, the planet’s original inhabitants who want their planet back and will go to any lengths to do so…

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: The Doctor and Peri must escape the Punishment Dome, a sadistic system of entertainment and political control on Varos.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: The governor of Varos begins to suspect someone is working against him. The alien Sil puts his plans into motion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vengeance on Varos
programme.desc: The governor faces the punishment dome alongside Peri whilst the Doctor fights to stop the evil alien Sil.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Two Doctors

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Two Doctors

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Two Doctors

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: The Doctor has an appointment with the Immortal, while Peri finds herself caught up with Glitz and the Tribe of the Free and Merdeen begins to question all he believes.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: The Doctor is foxed by Drathro's logic so it takes Glitz's blunt lies to buy them some time until Ravolox can be saved. Meanwhile, the Tribe makes a foolhardy attack on Marb Arch.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: The next story the Valeyard shows the Doctor sees TARDIS arrives on Thoros-Beta, homeworld of the Mentors and the Doctor and Peri's old foe.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: The scientist Crozier keeps making promises he can't keep to Kiv, and Yrcanos and Peri are betrayed by the addled Doctor, although he is sure the Matrix is being manipulated...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: Kiv's brain rejects his new body and Crozier is forced to rethink his plan. From the trial room, the Doctor can only watch as Peri and Yrcanos appear to be massacred.

programme.desc: As the Possidor Ambassador visits, Sil is appalled to realise Crozier has selected Peri to be the Kiv's new host body - a move Yrcanos takes exception to with devastating results.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: The Doctor and Mel are taking a rest aboard the Hyperion III when a series of murders lead them to suspect there is more to Professor Laskey's party than it initially appears...

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: Trial of a Time Lord
programme.desc: The Vervoids begin to attack the crew and passengers, while someone kills a Mogarian who isn't really a Mogarian at all, but an old friend of the Doctor's...

programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: The Story of Lassie
programme.desc: For 50 years, she has represented all that is good about the enduring bonds between human beings and their dogs. She first leaped to stardom in the 1943 MGM film, Lassie Come Home.

programme.title: 2019 AKC National Obedience Championships
programme.desc: Part 4 of The AKC National Obedience Championships 2019

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, Peter braves the elements and heads out to pregnancy test a small herd of young cows. But the farm is on high ground and with heavy snow settling on Yorkshire’s hills will winter’s icy grip prevent him from getting there?

programme.title: Pick A Puppy
programme.desc: Beverley Mahood meets the Montgomery family, who are looking for a puppy that will grow up with their young daughter, Grace. They visit Alaskan Malamutes, Leonburgers and Bernese Mountain Dogs. Each family member has a favourite, which makes choosi …

programme.title: Animals Unleashed
programme.desc: A naughty French Bulldog jumps on the bed, a goose gets nibbly, and two owls put on a show. And in our Top 5, a pony tosses a girl in the mud.

programme.title: Puppy Love
programme.desc: The cutest puppies. Nonstop.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Guilty Pleasures

programme.title: Animal Attractions
programme.desc: Pet Trainer 911 finds a new home for an unwanted dog and discovers that divorce can be hard on pets too. Is your lifestyle energetic enough for a Jack Russell Terrier?

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Bird on dog's back; dog climbing stairs backwards; bird on toy train.

programme.title: Pet Obsessed: Friend or Foe
programme.desc: Keep your friends close, your enemies closer, and your pets closest.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian's patients include a horse with infected hooves, while Peter Wright is worried about a pedigree cat that is in labour and also has to deal with an angry monitor lizard. The two vets find time to attend the Great Yorkshire Show.

programme.title: Walks With My Dog
programme.desc: Comedian Bill Bailey is taking his dog Louie on one of his favourite walks in the Lake District. Actress Sarah Parish is in the New Forest with her Border terrier, Pig.

programme.title: To The Rescue
programme.desc: Tommy reveals the amazing transformations of dog rescue! From star treatment for neglected Pomeranians to a dachshund's weight loss journey, these dogs show the power of rescue.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, Peter is mystified by the contents of Khufu the cat’s stomach after his owner is concerned that he has totally lost his appetite. Peter performs surgery on the cat but when he opens its stomach, he gets the shock of his life!

programme.title: Puppy Love Marathon
programme.desc: Celebrate puppies with a Puppython! The cutest puppies, nonstop.

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick tells Krystle of his deep feelings for her; Steven and Sammy Jo marry; Fallon cancels her abortion; after the scandal caused by the paparazzi photos of Alexis and Blake, Krystle leaves her husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Nick persuades Krystle to leave Blake; Steven and Sammy Jo announce they are married; Blake is attacked by gangsters and blinded when his car is bombed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake remains blinded following the explosion; Nick asks Krystle to divorce her husband and marry him; Blake investigates Nick's past; Alexis is determined to drive Krystle from Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon confesses her love to Nick, but he is interested in Krystle; Blake's attempts to bring gangster Logan Rhinewood before a Crime Committee hearing are thwarted; Sammy Jo tells Alexis she knows her secret; Blake receives an anonymous letter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: At a party in her honor, Sammy Jo embarrasses the Carringtons and reveals to Fallon that Blake is not her father; Jeff leaves the party with Claudia; Blake tells Krystle his eyesight is restored; Fallon is left unconscious after a car accident.

programme.desc: Our film journey begins in Alaska's west. We are hoping to find glacier bears in the glacial regions of the Katmai National Park on the Douglas River.

programme.desc: Drew and Agatha have to deal with a dog with a broken leg brought in by a group of youngsters with no money. Will Agatha stand up to Drew who has decided to send them away to find money, by insisting the dog stays at the clinic?

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Switzerland - Jungfrau
programme.desc: From early morning cheese-making to yodeling through the Alps, Ashley goes back to her Swiss roots in the mountains. The sweetness and secret recipe to their most prestigious chocolate is revealed.

programme.title: Jungle Planet
programme.desc: Some of the forests with the most character in the world are the juniper woods. Each juniper tree has its own shape. Juniper woodlands are open and adapted to cold and dry climates. They are of a unique beauty emerging from between bare rock.

programme.title: Asia - Secret Lives, Hidden Places
programme.desc: The man who saved the last colony of Guizhou golden monkeys is getting old. He must pass the responsibility on to the next in line. But will his successor be able to keep the monkeys safe?

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats: Episode 4
programme.desc: Recently Priscilla bought an adopted boy pup from a rival gang to the Gosa Burrow. Unfortunately his acceptance into the Gosa group was far from ideal.

programme.title: World's Wildest City: Anchorage
programme.desc: Anchorage has a rather unique resident who is renowned as nature's lumberjack and North America's largest rodent, the beaver. With their powerful teeth, the trees they fell can be huge, and their dams can be seen from space.

programme.title: On The Trails Of The Glaciers

programme.title: In the Feeding Grounds of the Humpback Whales

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a man is gunned down in his own garage, investigators use science to unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay hace que los nueve Chefs restantes se sometan a una prueba de sabor con los ojos vendados. Los ganadores pueden ir a un spa; los perdedores deben limpiar la habitación.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay pide un voluntario para cambiar de bando. La dinámica del grupo cambia a medida que los equipos enfrentan su próximo desafío: crear cuatro platos con veinte ingredientes específicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el desafío de apertura, los dos equipos compiten en una carrera de relevos. Los ganadores tienen lecciones de surf, mientras que los perdedores deben limpiar Hell's Kitchen de arriba a abajo.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay inspira a los seis concursantes, llevándolos al restaurante que administrará el ganador de esta temporada. El ganador de la temporada 3, Rock Harper, hace una aparición especial.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los cinco Chefs restantes a que enseñen a amas de casa con problemas en la cocina a preparar una comida gourmet. El ganador recibe consejos culinarios de los Chefs Mark Peel y Ben Ford.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los últimos cuatro participantes preparan un almuerzo para los invitados sorpresa: ochenta delicadas madres embarazadas. El Chef que tenga el plato preferido gana un boleto de compras de $1,000. Mientras los demás deben limpiar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay prepara un desayuno para los Chefs restantes y luego les pide que reproduzcan el plato. Más tarde, Ramsay sabotea la cena para ver cómo reaccionan los competidores ante la adversidad.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos finalistas visitan el restaurante del Chef Ramsay en Nueva York, donde los Chefs ejecutivos de otros restaurantes de Ramsay encuentran que sus platos son únicos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: La cuarta temporada llega a su fin con los finalistas trabajando junto a los competidores previamente eliminados para el servicio de cena final.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Dieciséis Chefs profesionales compiten por un puesto de Chef ejecutivo en el Borgata Hotel, Casino and Spa en Atlantic City. Los participantes deben sorprender al Chef Ramsay con sus platos originales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después del desastre en la cena de la noche anterior, el Chef Ramsay le presenta a los concursantes la comida que desperdiciaron.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los catorce Chefs restantes visitan una carnicería para aprender sobre varios cortes de carne y luego ponen en práctica sus conocimientos. Hell's Kitchen se convierte en la noche en un asador.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Se espera que los trece Chefs restantes sirvan el desayuno a cincuenta jóvenes futbolistas y porristas. Sin embargo, un equipo se queda sin huevos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los doce candidatos restantes compran en un mercado asiático y preparan platos de fusión para el Chef Ramsay y la escritora de cocina Tanya Steel.
